elements.text: You have started a new group project, and you are given a task that normally takes a few days, but you manage to finish it the same day. You show it to the rest of your group, who find only one mistake in your work. As the meeting ends, you expect they think your work is...

elements.name: quick_task_completion--academics_work_career_development--puzzle1
elements.incorrect_feedback: Whoops! That doesn't look right. Please wait a moment and try again.
